op.text: [as of 2025-05-24] Cleared by physical therapist for light jogging (twenty minutes, flat ground, every other day); completed first jog 2025-05-24 morning along esplanade; ankle recovering; goal is pain-free running by fall without re-injury

op.note: 2025-05-24: Dana states 'I've made peace with' the marathon being off this year and describes being 'weirdly okay with it now'; attributes shift to 'The ankle taught me something about not white-knuckling timelines.' Contrast with sal-23 (2025-04-14) where withdrawal felt like loss of 'the first future-shaped thing I'd built since mom' and she 'didn't want to hear' reassurance. Appears to be genuine acceptance rather than resignation.

op.text: [as of 2025-05-24] Sam built out spare room as home office (three monitors, foam panels) for remote Austin role; starts in couple weeks; described as nervous-excited
